source_pr.title: *: support using clause in join statement.

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select * from t1 right join t2 using (a) order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("2 5 4", "3 6 <nil>")) (executor/join_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select * from t1 right join t2 using (a) order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("2 5 4", "3 6 <nil>")) (executor/join_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select * from t1 right join t2 using (a) order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("2 5 4", "3 6 <nil>")) (executor/join_test.go)
